scripts.build: npm run build --prefix api && npm run build --prefix admin && npm run build --prefix tenant && npm run build --prefix platform
scripts.lint: npm run prisma:generate --prefix api && npm run lint --prefix api && npm run lint --prefix admin && npm run lint --prefix tenant && npm run lint --prefix platform
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check --prefix api && npm run format:check --prefix admin && npm run format:check --prefix tenant && npm run format:check --prefix platform
